negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_012
prompt: A documentary-style video capturing the operations within a fruit processing facility, focusing on a conveyor belt system sorting and transporting tomatoes. The scene is set indoors, with clean, light-colored walls and a gray floor, suggesting a packaging factory environment. The conveyor belts, composed of cylindrical rollers, are positioned side by side, with tomatoes of varying colors, including light green and red-orange, scattered across them. The tomatoes move steadily along the conveyor, showcasing a continuous and efficient process. In the background, stacks of wooden crates are visible, adding to the industrial setting. The machinery includes a metal chute at the end of one of the conveyors. The overall scene remains consistent, emphasizing the smooth operation of the conveyor belts and the orderly movement of the tomatoes.
